title: Create and deploy new content
body: # Pull Request ## Description This PR introduces 5 new, cutting-edge AI articles to the blog and updates the frontend to prominently feature them. The goal is to expand the website's content library and ensure new insights are immediately visible to users. Specifically, this includes: - Adding 5 new blog posts covering topics like AI Composite Agents, Cognitive Load Optimization, AI Contract Intelligence, AI-Powered Incident Prediction, and Real-Time Personalization at the Edge. - Updating `src/content/latest-articles.ts` to include these new articles at the top of the list. - Modifying `src/components/LatestContentBanner2025.tsx` to highlight the new content and update the relevant statistics on the homepage banner. ## Type of Change - [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue) - [x] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality) - [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected) - [ ] Documentation update - [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes) - [ ] Performance improvement - [ ] Security fix ## Testing - [x] I have tested this change locally - [ ] I have added tests for this change - [x] All existing tests pass - [x] I have tested the build process ## Checklist - [x] My code follows the project's style guidelines - [x] I have performed a self-review of my code - [x] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas - [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation - [x] My changes generate no new warnings - [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works - [x] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes - [x] Any dependent changes have been merged and published ## Screenshots (if applicable) N/A ## Additional Notes During the merge process, a conflict was encountered in `src/content/latest-articles.ts` due to concurrent changes. This conflict was resolved by keeping both sets of articles, ensuring the newly added articles are at the top of the list. ---

title: Create and deploy new content
body: # Pull Request ## Description This PR introduces new AI-focused content and a dedicated promotional banner to the frontend. It includes: - Two new blog posts: "AI Innovation Breakthrough 2026" and "AI Automation Enterprise 2026". - One new case study: "AI Transformation Mega Success 2026". - A new `AIInnovationBreakthrough2026Banner` component, integrated into the homepage (`/app/page.tsx`) to prominently advertise this new content. ## Type of Change - [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue) - [x] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality) - [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected) - [ ] Documentation update - [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes) - [ ] Performance improvement - [ ] Security fix ## Testing - [x] I have tested this change locally - [ ] I have added tests for this change - [x] All existing tests pass - [x] I have tested the build process ## Checklist - [x] My code follows the project's style guidelines - [x] I have performed a self-review of my code - [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas - [x] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation - [x] My changes generate no new warnings - [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works - [x] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes - [x] Any dependent changes have been merged and published ## Screenshots (if applicable) N/A ## Additional Notes A merge conflict in `app/page.tsx` was resolved during the merge, ensuring proper integration of the new banner without affecting existing functionality. ---

title: Create and deploy new content
body: # Pull Request ## Description This PR introduces a significant update to the website's content and its frontend presentation. It includes the creation of 10 new revolutionary articles and 6 compelling case studies, which are now prominently advertised on the homepage to enhance user engagement and highlight new offerings. ## Type of Change - [x] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality) ## Testing - [x] I have tested this change locally ## Checklist - [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines - [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code - [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas - [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation - [ ] My changes generate no new warnings - [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works - [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes - [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published ## Screenshots (if applicable) N/A ## Additional Notes The new content includes articles on topics like AI Autonomous Code Refactoring, Quantum-ML Hybrid Computing, and AI-Powered Incident Prediction, along with case studies showcasing client success in various industries. The homepage advertising enhancements include a top banner, a dedicated "mega breakthrough" section, visual cards for technology areas, and multiple calls-to-action to drive traffic to the new content. ---
